title: panicum olyroides var. fimbriatum
intro: Panicum olyroides var. fimbriatum, also known as Fimbriate Panic Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fimbriate Panic Grass include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Fimbriate Panic Grass can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal use.
